Class ResourceBundleImpl

java.lang.Object
java.util.ResourceBundle
org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.impl.ResourceBundleImpl
@API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.1") public class ResourceBundleImpl extends ResourceBundle
A simple implementation of ResourceBundle for testing purposes.
